engine: proto_v0 / 0.4.0 + TASK-145 router cream-cheese anchor (EV-025, routing-only)

checks.constructs_applied: PASS (sub-pool, developmental D3<=20g, light/MDF, fermentation EV-015 guard, A-ceiling C1-C6, endemic Sec 6.4)
checks.insufficient_0pct_displayable: PASS (0/57 — the 3 prior cream-cheese 'default' insufficients now route to dairy_protein and score)
checks.router_regression_locked: PASS (15/15 incl. 3 new cream-cheese entries; frozen 12 unchanged)

residual_misroute.name: גבינת עזים 32% שומן
residual_misroute.note: 1 high-fat (32%) goat soft cheese misroutes to snack_bar_granola. 1.8% total — under the 5% gate. Low priority; revisit with a goat-cheese signal at a future run if the pool grows.

warnings.detail: 6 white-cheese SKUs reach grade A on raw macros (גבינה לבנה 5%/9%, גבינה טבורוג 5%, score 85) but FAIL the dairy A-ceiling C1-C6 — all a_eligible_pre_routing=false, binding on C3 (no confirmed/credited live culture in the scraped ingredient panel). Per EV-021/RULING-DAIRY-A-01 these A grades are WITHHELD pending Nutrition review. The A-ceiling functioned correctly — conservative dairy ceiling (clean live-culture confirmation required for A).
warnings.action: Nutrition review (Stage 6). Withheld until signed; richer culture scrape/OCR would re-test C3.

warnings.detail: Only 3/57 panels surface culture vocabulary → EV-015 credit sparse, A-ceiling C3 rarely passes. Truthful data-coverage finding (parallels run_yogurt_003), not a bug.
warnings.action: Disclosure-level for launch; no engine change.

warnings.detail: Labaneh pool = 3 (truthful — most 'לבנה' SKUs are white cheese). Too small for stable intra-pool ranking.
warnings.action: Broaden the labaneh query at a future run; acceptable for v1.

verdict_detail: With the TASK-145 cream-cheese router anchor (EV-025, routing-only, regression-locked 15/15), the misroute gate now PASSES at 1.8% and INSUFFICIENT is 0%. Coverage, sub-pools, and all cheese governance constructs pass; the A-ceiling correctly withholds 6 macro-A white cheeses (no confirmed culture, C3). The only remaining gate to LIVE promotion is Nutrition/Product grade-publication sign-off (Stage 6) — a human gate, not a data/QA failure. Frontend package factory_run_002 is launch-candidate (50/57 display-approved), held NON-AUTHORITATIVE pending that sign-off.
